description: Triple-hub compression — the corpus's THIRD triple-attribution node and the FIRST where all three verbs land in their CORRUPTED register simultaneously. Towa's bio-engineering-of-Mira apparatus-of-extraction-via-manufacture (labor-corrupted), the Time Breakers' charter to corrupt-canon-itself rather than refuse-any-particular-apparatus (rebellion-corrupted, the aestheticized-refusal-of-the-given-for-personal-elevation maximum case), and Towa's scientist-mother-witch role oscillating between maternal-care register and weapons-development register (stewardship-corrupted, the aether-foundation register one scale up). Worth Behold-ing — the prior two triple-hubs (aether-rangers wave 60, theros-pantheon wave 74) both land at least one verb clean; this is the first all-three-corrupted triple. Bundle copy can lean on the complete-corruption-of-the-political-verb-triangle framing without inventing canon. Body augmented with a Triple-thesis attribution section enumerating the three corrupted-register verbs with canonical-evidence anchors.
